creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 150419
x11/xvt -- requisite QA to accompany the port.

The only errors that are emitted, are completely harmless, and expected.
As to the 2 regarding XFCE*. Rather than cobbling a separate desktop
file for both GNOME, and XFCE. I simply combined the 2 in one. It
works perfectly as-is for both, without any errors at all.

The 2 SUID errors, are also fine. As it *is* necessary to install them
suid. I also performed the tests with elevated privileges.

Thank you for all your time, and consideration.

--Chris
